title: eriogonum cithariforme var. cithariforme
intro: Eriogonum cithariforme var. cithariforme, also known as the Silver Buckwheat, is a perennial shrub in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eriogonum cithariforme var. cithariforme include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
